transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: A builds a coherent belief-reframing sequence and often absolves the reader, yet uses disgust, catastrophic health imagery, absolute causal claims, unverifiable success claims, and rigid compliance assurances; its extensive expression overlap with B also creates risk.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B contains the same distinctive claims and language in mechanically disordered form: summaries precede support, references lose antecedents, and compassionate framing is diluted while the fear, medical overreach, and unsupported testimony remain.

parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap likely comes from sequence integrity: ordered premises support evaluable belief revision, while mechanically reordered fragments separate conclusions from reasons and reduce the method to assertions and commands.
